Hazel's mother wanted her to attend the cancer-support group because she believed Hazel was depressed and hoped she would make friends who were going through similar experiences. The context states that Frannie urged Hazel to go to help her connect with others facing the same illness. This was intended to provide emotional support and companionship.  

\boxed{\text{Hazel's mother wanted her to attend a cancer-support group because she believed Hazel was depressed and hoped she would make friends who were going through the same thing.}}
